notes: Offline-measurable Phase 1 baseline captured immediately after wiring the RequirementGraph parser into `background.js` behind `bp_phase1_wiring` (flag OFF by default). Phase 2 will extend this baseline with runtime metrics (honoredRate, archetypeDistance, penaltyEffectiveness) that require an LLM and the full intent-fixture prompts. Regenerate via `node scripts/generate-phase1-baseline.js`.

tests.knownFailureNote: Phase 2 preferInPerson scorer gap — deliberate, documented in scoring.test.js
